headline: Goldman Sachs Names The Progressive Corporation (PGR) among Appealing Insurance Investments
summary: The Progressive Corporation (NYSE:PGR) ranks among the 14 safe stocks to buy now for a starter stock portfolio. Goldman Sachs reaffirmed its buy rating and $225 price target for The Progressive Corporation (NYSE:PGR) on February 23 in response to the company’s January 2026 results.
